title: After the Nikkei Shinshun Hai: A Whole New Me ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff, pant! Phew... Woohoo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Zoom! Straight out the gate! Let's... GOOO!
WAAAHEEEEEY! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She runs without any hesitation, her form infused
with the same party energy as her introduction. It
feels good just watching her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may have blossomed a little late, but she's
finally come into her own.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Looks like everyone's starting to thaw out.
Let's see if I can't really fire them up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Mejiro?!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Palmer?!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Woohooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Palmer!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Waheeeeey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even the fans who were confused at the start are
now completely taken by her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She makes the race a real party and steals the
audience's hearts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Aw yeah! That gave me life!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Heck yeah, bestie!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, you guuuys! This is it! This is what I've
been looking for!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
This is the kinda running that yeets the pressure
off!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: It's like I'm living for the first time! And life is liiit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Nothing scares me anymore! I feel like I can go
anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh? Come again?
choice_data_list: Is there really nothing that scares you now?
Is there really nothing that scares you now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hm, not that I can think of... I mean, I'm kinda on
a runner's high right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she's truly no longer scared by anything, then
there's no reason to hold back. I think it's high
time to set her next race, and for that...
choice_data_list: Then let's tackle the spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: The Tenno Sho... That means...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'll be up against McQueen! And possibly Ryan!
And on top of that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The Tenno Sho is, like, super duper, mega huge...
Not to mention really important to my family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: And you want me to run there? No cap?
choice_data_list: No cap. If you're up for it, that is.
No cap. If you're up for it, that is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And you want me to run it just like today? Full on
me, loud and proud?
choice_data_list:
I can't think of a better place for you to flaunt
your true self.

I can't think of a better place for you to flaunt
your true self.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Should I seriously do it at the spring Tenno Sho?
But I'm pretty sure... Actually, I'm absolutely
sure...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
...Granny Mejiro's gonna be there! Can I really do
that in front of her? Like for real?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wait for Mejiro Palmer's reaction. I'm not going
to force her to run in this race. After all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stipulation for her to compete in it is that she
must run it with a full heart. I watch as she mulls it
over...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Just thinking about that took some years
off my life... But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right...
I'll... I'll do it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'll run... I wanna see how far I can go.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: For real, Palmster?! Woo!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You got this for sure! You're the best there is!
Yodo's got nothin' on you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Don't hold back one little bit! Kick butts, take
names, and win like mad! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'm in.
I'll do it, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
No better way to be me than to go off at the
spring Tenno Sho! I'm literally shaking, but let's
goooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer, trembling with fear and
excitement for the unknown, has decided to run
in the spring Tenno Sho.
